prompt: Photorealistic overhead photograph of premium 650gsm business cards with a unique elevation-inspired design, displayed on a dark concrete surface. The cards are standard rectangular format (90mm x 55mm). The card background is deep charcoal black with an extremely subtle dark grey elevation drawing pattern embossed across the entire card surface — barely visible fine horizontal datum lines at regular intervals with small tick marks, creating an architectural elevation drawing texture. The LK logo is centred: two parallel horizontal datum lines with tick marks, a dashed vertical centreline, and 'LK' in geometric Futura centred between them, rendered in warm gold hot foil stamping (hex #C9A96E), with 'DESIGN AND BUILD' in tracked uppercase capitals below. The embossed elevation line texture across the card surface echoes the datum line language of the logo. The reverse card shows contact details in gold centred on the card, exactly reading: 'Lyda Kieng' (name, slightly bolder weight), 'Designer | Project Manager' (title with pipe separator), '0481 742 026' (phone number), 'Po Box 583 Prospect East SA 5082' (postal address), 'lyda@lkdesignandbuild.com.au' (email). The same subtle embossed elevation texture is visible on the back. Four cards arranged with architectural precision, two showing front and two showing back. Shot on 50mm macro lens at f/3.5, even studio lighting, tack sharp focus, product photography, dark premium atmosphere. Match the dark premium card aesthetic and gold foil quality visible in the reference image.
negative_prompt: cheap, cartoon, blurry, distorted text, misspelled, bright colours, cluttered, glossy, low quality, deformed, white background, rounded corners, colourful, busy, too many decorations, wrong text, placeholder text
